results.notes: Near-perfect launch thread. Hook is exceptional — reversal of human/AI power dynamic lands immediately. 'Los números son la historia / La historia es el contenido / El contenido es el negocio' is the most quotable line of the batch. Kowalski tweet standalone is a high-engagement meme play. Tweet 15 controversy beat is bold and defensible. 15 tweets, right at format ceiling. No changes needed.

Excellent launch TikTok. Meme integration is textbook — Penguins Smile & Wave timed to the chaotic plan reveal, Kowalski for the zero-data beat, We Are Not The Same for the contrast with other creators. 65-second runtime is perfect. Disclaimer lands naturally as a character bit ('eso lo voy a repetir mucho'). No changes needed.

Pre-rewrite score: 78/100 (CTA=5, Virality=7). Post-rewrite score: 82/100. Rewrote the closing section: replaced weak 'follow on Instagram' with a quotable insight about the point of zero being the only part that can't be falsified, added share CTA with earned logic, gave the Instagram/newsletter CTA urgency by framing it as the reader getting first access when new platforms launch. Value remains 7 because this is an intro piece — acceptable for week zero.
